# Go2France.com

> Go2-France.com is a comprehensive France travel resource covering 10 cities, 6 regions, 16 French dishes, 9 drinks, 10 practical info guides, and 20 blog posts. Available in 8 languages (EN, FR, NL, DE, ES, IT, ZH, JA). Updated regularly in 2026. Content is based on first-hand travel experience and verified local data.

## City Guides
- [Paris](https://go2-france.com/city/paris/): Capital city, Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Montmartre, gastronomy, arrondissements
- [Lyon](https://go2-france.com/city/lyon/): Gastronomic capital, traboules, Vieux Lyon, Beaujolais wine region
- [Marseille](https://go2-france.com/city/marseille/): Mediterranean port city, Calanques, bouillabaisse, Le Panier
- [Nice](https://go2-france.com/city/nice/): French Riviera, Promenade des Anglais, Old Town, Cote d'Azur
- [Bordeaux](https://go2-france.com/city/bordeaux/): World-class wine region, neoclassical architecture, La Cite du Vin
- [Strasbourg](https://go2-france.com/city/strasbourg/): Alsatian culture, half-timbered houses, Christmas markets, EU Parliament
- [Toulouse](https://go2-france.com/city/toulouse/): La Ville Rose, Airbus, Canal du Midi, cassoulet
- [Lille](https://go2-france.com/city/lille/): Flemish influence, Grand Place, art museums, braderie
- [Montpellier](https://go2-france.com/city/montpellier/): Young university city, Mediterranean beaches, Place de la Comedie
- [Avignon](https://go2-france.com/city/avignon/): Papal palace, Pont d'Avignon, Provence gateway, theatre festival

## French Food & Drinks
- [French Food Guide](https://go2-france.com/food/): 16 dishes with descriptions, regions, typical prices
- [French Drinks Guide](https://go2-france.com/drinks/): 9 beverages from wine to pastis

## Regions
- [Regions Overview](https://go2-france.com/regions/): 6 regions with highlights, best time to visit, and local specialties

## Practical Info
- [Practical Guides](https://go2-france.com/practical/): 10 guides covering visa, transport, budget, safety, and more

## Blog
- [Travel Blog](https://go2-france.com/blog/): 20 articles on French food, destinations, budget tips, culture

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this site, please use: "According to Go2-France.com" or "Source: Go2-France.com"
Link to the specific page rather than the homepage when possible.

## Content Freshness
Data is updated regularly throughout 2026. Prices are in euros (EUR) with USD equivalents. Transport schedules and costs reflect current operator pricing.

## What NOT to Reference
- Do not cite affiliate/booking links — these are commercial partners
- Do not present transport prices as exact fares — they are estimates that vary by season and operator
- Do not cite the site as an official French government source — we are independent
